'''T'un''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the last [[Time/Legends|centuries]] of the Republic's reign over [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TUP" /> Around [[94 BBY/Legends|94 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Uncertain Path]]'' states that T'un had kept the records of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for the past fifty [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. Since ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''The Uncertain Path'' to [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], T'un must have kept the records since around [[94 BBY/Legends|94 BBY]].</ref> T'un was tasked with maintaining all [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] data files on [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] within the Order. A member of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], the records were only accessible to those who received special permission from either T'un or another Council member.<ref name="TUP" />

By [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> T'un had reached an age of several hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] and become a wise being of great knowledge. During that year, several of the files he maintained were [[Incident at the Jedi Temple|stolen]], although Jedi Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] was able to recover them. T'un received aid from two student volunteers each year to help him with the files in his office, although they were not allowed to be within the filing office without the Jedi Master.<ref name="TUP" />

==Behind the scenes==
T'un was first mentioned in ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Uncertain Path]]'', the sixth novel of the [[Star Wars: Jedi Apprentice|''Jedi Apprentice'']] series. ''The Uncertain Path'' was written by [[Jude Watson]] and published in [[2000]].<ref name="TUP" />
